# Creative & Frontend Design Arsenal

## Native Nexus wrappers (4) - the router and bridges
- **nexus-frontend-arsenal** - main router with decision tree
- **nexus-direction-picker** - 3-5 visual directions before code
- **nexus-token-map** - map external tokens onto Nexus canonical
- **nexus-brand-extract** - native brand extraction via Hermes browser_* tools

- frontend-design, impeccable-design-polish, taste-skill (split + NEXUS-OVERRIDES), gsap-react, gsap-scrolltrigger

  paywall-upgrade-cro, competitive-ads-extractor, agent-browser
